mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.contract_id, c.customer_id, c.insured_id, c.product_name, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.status, cu.name AS customerName, ip.name AS insuredName FROM contract c JOIN customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id JOIN insured_person ip ON c.insured_id = ip.insured_id ORDER BY c.contract_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
SELECT notice_id, title, writer, reg_date, important FROM ( SELECT * FROM notice ORDER BY notice_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
